title: tribulus terrestris var. lanuginosus
intro: Tribulus terrestris var. lanuginosus, also known as the woolly goat's head or woolly caltrop, is a variant of the Tribulus terrestris plant, a type of flowering plant in the caltrop family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic properties. The health benefits of Tribulus terrestris var. lanuginosus include improving cardiovascular health, reducing blood pressure, and enhancing male fertility, as well as promoting overall well-being. Tribulus terrestris var. lanuginosus can be prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or powder, and is often taken in conjunction with other herbal remedies to support overall health and vitality.
